title: Nanshi: History of the Southern Dynasties, Selection 3
description: From Nanshi: History of the Southern Dynasties: chapter 3
introduction: From Nanshi: History of the Southern Dynasties: chapter 3

translation.text: From Nanshi: History of the Southern Dynasties: A foundational chapter of one of China's official Twenty-Four Histories, recording the deeds, institutions, and biographies of an entire dynasty.
